title: dupatya pachyphylla
intro: Dupatya pachyphylla, also known as the "Kabat Champa" or "Mountain Champa," is a species of flowering plant in the family Bignoniaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The leaves and flowers of the Dupatya pachyphylla plant have been used in traditional medicine to provide relief from inflammation and to treat digestive problems, such as diarrhea and dysentery. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas and infusions, which can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
